title: Building Blocks Flowers Bouquet Kit, 680PCS Everlasting Roses/Tulips Artificial Flowers Set, Creative Gift for Mother’s Day, Valentine’s, Christmas, Birthdays, Ages 6+ & Adults (No Vase)
features: 13 ROSE TULIP SET: This 680 pcs rose building block toy contains 3 red roses, 2 roses, 5 tulips and 3 gypsophilas and premium feeling box. There are efficient and easy to understand instructions to guide you through putting them together! The tulips and roses are uniquely colored, and the building is European and American in style, showing off the owner's unique personality. This is also a beautiful flower decoration for girls.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE AND WEAR RESISTANT: All the blocks of the rose bouquet building block set are made of high-quality ABS material, which is hard and wear-resistant, and the blocks are also easy to articulate and firm, which is suitable for children and girls to assemble to improve their hands-on ability and thinking ability.

PERFECT FLOWER DECORATION: This unique block of roses and tulips is perfect for decorating any scene, such as office, dining table, bedroom, living room and any other space. The stems and petals of the roses bouquet are adjustable, allowing you to customize its length, and the bouquet is vase-less, making it easy to arrange and use for optimal decorative effect. No need to water and easy to take care of.

EXCELLENT GIFT: This special block rose is packed by an exquisite box, not only the box looks beautiful, but also the colour of the rose bouquet is very unique and highly stylized. It is designed for Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, wedding anniversary, and is a DIY gift for lovers, mothers, family members, and kids, which can keep away from screen assembly, relieve eye fatigue and stress, and bring a beautiful moral to decorate your life.

EXCELLENT AFTER-SALES SERVICE: If there are defects on the product, please contact us in time, we will serve you within 24 hours to help you solve the problem. We hope you will have a perfect product experience! Bring home excellent quality roses that will never fade and lose their colour!

KEEP CHILDREN ENTERTAINED - Perfect for school or at home. Hours of fun colouring and then magically changing the pictures with the magic pen
CREATIVE WAY TO HAVE LEARN - Kids Arts and crafts is a great way to develop early learning skills
INCLUDES ALL YOU NEED - This pack includes 7 colour changing pens + 1 magic pen! These are all packaged in 100% recyclable packaging
Suitable for children ages 3 years & over
